title: Crompton Greaves is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Crompton Greaves is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!
